# Atlas FIRE Decision Engine — Voice Briefing Data

> Twice-daily portfolio analytics and Monte Carlo simulation results.
> Engine: Atlas v3 | Strategy: BBD (Buy, Borrow, Die) | FIRE target: December 2028

## Endpoints
- [Latest Briefing (JSON)](/atlas-fire-brief/latest.json): Current cycle with voice_summary field
- [Latest Briefing (Markdown)](/atlas-fire-brief/latest.md): Same data in readable markdown — preferred for voice
- [Dated Archive](/atlas-fire-brief/daily/): Per-cycle archived briefings

## How to use
Fetch latest.md first. Read the voice_summary field aloud. Then answer questions from the structured sections.
Speak numbers naturally (e.g. "$3,176,241" → "three point two million").
Keep responses short — the user is driving.

## Update cadence
Published twice daily: ~9:30 AM PT (AM cycle) and ~10:00 PM PT (PM cycle).
Check meta/updated.txt for exact publish timestamp.

## Security
This site contains zero credentials, account numbers, names, or emails.
Published data: portfolio values, sim percentiles, strategy status, research sentiment.
